purpose: test whether a realistic external provider can author fixed result-domain rows, fixtures, hard negatives, and conformance gates without opening external influence

dry_run_pack.slice: ImmutableList.of and ImmutableSet.of fixed collection result domains

authorability_rows.builtin_status: builtin descriptors can name package or stdlib ownership
authorability_rows.result: available for provenance and compatibility, but not occurrence proof

authorability_rows.builtin_status: compiled language/import producers can emit dependency-backed evidence
authorability_rows.result: providers can declare the producer shape, but v0 cannot execute it

authorability_rows.builtin_status: compiled builtin packs emit admitted LibraryApi occurrence evidence
authorability_rows.result: required for fixed result-domain rows, but external producer runtime remains absent

authorability_rows.builtin_status: cycle 1 materializes fixed call domains for admitted builtin LibraryApi rows
authorability_rows.result: external manifests can express the row using the same domain vocabulary
provider can publish useful review evidence without influence

authorability_rows.builtin_status: builtin gates are owned by release tests and inventory
authorability_rows.result: a passed gate clears only executable-conformance-unavailable

authorability_rows.builtin_status: not generalized across ecosystem lockfiles yet
authorability_rows.result: manifest package metadata must not be treated as project dependency proof

authorability_rows.builtin_status: compiled Rust producers are the only exact evidence runtime
authorability_rows.result: requires separate trust, sandbox, provenance, and rollback design

authorability_rows.capability: HOF demand and materialization result shape
authorability_rows.builtin_status: narrow builtin iterator/promise rows exist, broad HOF result-domain rows remain closed
authorability_rows.result: deferred to R5 because callback demand, laziness, materialization, and effects are high-risk

authorability_rows.capability: dtype, tensor shape, and vector mask domains
authorability_rows.result: requires future producer vocabulary; not solved by fixed result-domain authoring

remaining_before_external_influence: conflict-free row adoption or replacement policy
rollback and disable policy for external exact rows

product_output_gate.classification: metadata-only example and artifact change; no semantic query drift expected
product_output_gate.reason: the dry-run pack passes conformance but external rows remain blocked from query, normalize, value-graph, exact, and detection consumers

performance_gate.limit: no more than 10% median runtime regression
performance_gate.decision: documentation, example manifest, conformance, and artifact validation only
